params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, no fireball, no ignition plume, no launch already in progress, no explosion imagery, no second tower as hero, no roadway as subject, no poster composition, no multi-object launch complex
params.note_text: Final v3 beat 01 deliverable. Preserve the frozen pad warning, documentary pressure, and prelaunch stillness.
params.accent_palette: winter blue, off-white, charcoal, signal orange
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the frozen gantry evidence and any witness trace above the subtitle band and preserve the top UI band as cold empty air
params.signal_anchor: documented prelaunch warning held in frozen gantry steel and pad ice before Challenger flies
params.historical_anchor: Roger Boisjoly's warning held against the frozen Challenger launch pad before liftoff
params.surreal_breach: the cold air seems to hold the warning in place as if the launch were already morally overdue

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: frozen gantry steel, pad ice, and one implied human warning compressed into a single prelaunch evidence frame
support_fragments: real launch hardware and one witness-scale trace held subordinate to the warning atmosphere
cold pad air and brittle frost lines carrying the documented pressure before flight
directives: keep the frame prelaunch and documentary, not explosive
allow one witness trace without turning the image into a crowd scene
keep the warning pressure immediate at thumbnail size
